# vitepress-plugin-color-preview

> Automatic color swatches for VitePress documentation. Detects CSS color values and Tailwind classes in markdown and renders inline previews with hover tooltips and click-to-copy.

## Docs

- [Getting Started](https://klanghaus.github.io/vitepress-plugin-color-preview/getting-started): Installation and configuration
- [Inline Colors](https://klanghaus.github.io/vitepress-plugin-color-preview/inline): Inline code color swatches
- [Code Blocks](https://klanghaus.github.io/vitepress-plugin-color-preview/code-blocks): Fenced code block swatches
- [Color Palettes](https://klanghaus.github.io/vitepress-plugin-color-preview/palette): :::colors palette container
- [Design Tokens](https://klanghaus.github.io/vitepress-plugin-color-preview/tokens): Token table with color, name, variable, purpose
- [Tailwind Classes](https://klanghaus.github.io/vitepress-plugin-color-preview/tailwind): Tailwind CSS class detection
- [Supported Formats](https://klanghaus.github.io/vitepress-plugin-color-preview/formats): All supported color formats
- [API Reference](https://klanghaus.github.io/vitepress-plugin-color-preview/api): Exported functions and utilities
- [Full documentation](https://klanghaus.github.io/vitepress-plugin-color-preview/llms-full.txt): Complete docs in a single file
